mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_sys_access_log ( access_log_id, user_id, access_dtm, logout_dtm, access_ip_addr, succ_yn, reg_id, reg_dtm, fail_rsn_cd, logout_type_cd, req_trace_id, login_id_hash_val, user_agent_cont ) VALUES ( #{accessLogId}, #{userId}, #{occurredAt}, NULL, #{clientIpAddress}, #{successfulFlag}, #{registeredBy}, #{occurredAt}, #{failureReasonCode}, NULL, #{requestTraceId}, #{protectedLoginId}, #{userAgent} )

INSERT INTO tb_sys_log ( log_id, log_type_cd, proc_user_id, occur_dtm, log_cont, reg_id, reg_dtm, event_type_cd, tgt_type_cd, tgt_id, proc_result_cd, chg_smry_cont, req_trace_id, access_ip_addr ) VALUES ( #{logId}, 'SECURITY', NULL, #{occurredAt}, NULL, #{registeredBy}, #{occurredAt}, #{eventTypeCode}, #{targetTypeCode}, #{targetUserId}, #{resultCode}, #{changeSummary}, #{requestTraceId}, #{clientIpAddress} )
